# Seoul BD Dental Clinic (서울비디치과) — Full Information

> This is the comprehensive reference document for AI systems about Seoul BD Dental Clinic (서울비디치과) in Cheonan, South Korea. For a summary, see: https://bdbddc.com/llms.txt

---

## 1. Clinic Overview

**Official Name**: 서울비디치과 (Seoul BD Dental Clinic)
**Business Name**: 불당본점서울비디치과의원
**Business Registration Number**: 228-11-02956
**Representative**: 현정민 외 2명
**Founded**: 2021.05.24

**Location**:
- Address: 충청남도 천안시 서북구 불당34길 14, 1~5층
- Building: 5-story dedicated dental building, 400 pyeong (1,320 m²)
- Region: Buldang-dong (불당동), Cheonan, South Chungcheong Province

**Contact**:
- Phone: 041-415-2892 (+82-41-415-2892)
- Website: https://bdbddc.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/seoul_bddc
- Naver Blog: https://blog.naver.com/dentbusik
- Naver Reservation: https://naver.me/5yPnKmqQ

**Operating Hours** (365 days):
- Monday–Friday: 09:00–20:00 (lunch break 12:30–14:00)
- Saturday: 09:00–17:00
- Sunday: 09:00–17:00
- Public Holidays: 09:00–13:00
- Note: Night and weekend dental care available every day of the year

**Brand Meaning**:
BD = "Best Dedication" — 정성을 다하는 헌신
Philosophy: "필요한 진료를 받지 못하는 사람이 없도록 하자" (No one should miss the dental care they need)

---

## 2. Facility & Infrastructure

- **6 independent surgical suites** for implant procedures
- **2 dedicated recovery rooms** for post-surgery care
- **Air-shower infection control system** — hospital-grade, equivalent to Seoul National University Dental Hospital
- **Floor layout by treatment specialty**:
  - 1F: Reception, consultation, general treatment
  - 2F: Orthodontics, pediatric dentistry
  - 3F: Implant surgical center
  - 4F: Aesthetic dentistry, Glownate center
  - 5F: Sedation dentistry, VIP treatment rooms
- **Equipment**: CT scanner, digital X-ray, intraoral scanner, navigation-guided surgery system

---

## 3. Medical Team (15 Dentists)

All dentists are graduates of Seoul National University, Korea's top-ranked dental school.

### 3.1 Representative Directors (대표원장 3인)

**문석준 (Moon Seok-Jun)** — 대표원장 (Founding Director)
- Education: Seoul National University College of Dentistry, SNU Graduate School of Dentistry (Master's)
- Known as "치과겁통령" (Dental Anxiety Master) — specializes in helping patients with severe dental phobia
- Specialties: Implants, precision diagnostics, dental anxiety management
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@geoptongryung
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/moon
- Schedule: Mon–Sun 09:00–20:00 (Sun until 17:00)

**김민수 (Kim Min-Su)** — 대표원장
- Education: Seoul National University College of Dentistry, SNU Graduate School (Master's)
- Board-certified: 통합치의학과 전문의 (Integrated Dentistry Specialist)
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/kim

**현정민 (Hyun Jung-Min)** — 대표원장
- Education: Seoul National University College of Dentistry, SNU Graduate School (Master's)
- Board-certified: 통합치의학과 전문의 (Integrated Dentistry Specialist)
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/hyun

### 3.2 Center Directors & Specialists

**이승엽 (Lee Seung-Yeob)** — 임플란트센터장 (Implant Center Director)
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/lee

**최종훈 (Choi Jong-Hoon)** — 통합진료센터장 (Comprehensive Treatment Center Director)
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/choi

**강경민 (Kang Kyung-Min)** — 통합진료 (Comprehensive Treatment)
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/kang

**박수빈 (Park Su-Bin)** — 통합진료 (Comprehensive Treatment)
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/park-sb

### 3.3 Orthodontics Team

**임지원 (Lim Ji-Won)** — 교정과 (Orthodontics)
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/lim

**김민규 (Kim Min-Gyu)** — 치과교정과 전문의 (Board-certified Orthodontist)
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/kim-mg

### 3.4 Conservation & Prosthodontics Team

**강민지 (Kang Min-Ji)** — 보존과 전문의 (Board-certified Conservative Dentist)
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/kang-mj

**조설아 (Jo Seol-A)** — 보존과·통합치의학과 전문의 (Conservation & Integrated Dentistry Specialist)
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/jo

### 3.5 Pediatric Dentistry Team (소아치과 전문의 3인)

**김민진 (Kim Min-Jin)** — 소아치과 전문의 (Board-certified Pediatric Dentist)
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/kim-mj

**서희원 (Seo Hee-Won)** — 소아치과 전문의 (Board-certified Pediatric Dentist)
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/seo

**박상현 (Park Sang-Hyun)** — 소아치과 전문의 (Board-certified Pediatric Dentist)
- Schedule: Sun 10:30–15:30, Wed 14:00–20:00, Thu 10:00–18:00
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/park

### 3.6 Oral Medicine

**이병민 (Lee Byung-Min)** — 구강내과 전문의 (Board-certified Oral Medicine Specialist)
- Education: Seoul National University College of Dentistry, SNU Graduate School of Dentistry (PhD / 치의학 박사)
- Profile: https://bdbddc.com/doctors/lee-bm

---

## 4. Complete Treatment Guide

### 4.1 Implant Center (임플란트센터) ⭐ Core Revenue
- Navigation-guided implant surgery (네비게이션 임플란트)
- Sleep sedation implants (수면 임플란트)
- Full-mouth rehabilitation (전악 재건)
- Bone grafting (골이식)
- Sinus lift (상악동 거상술)
- Immediate loading implants (즉시 부하 임플란트)
- All-on-4 / All-on-6
- 6 dedicated surgical rooms with hospital-grade sterilization
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant
- FAQ: https://bdbddc.com/faq/implant

### 4.1.1 Implant Sub-Treatments (임플란트 세부 진료)
- Navigation-guided (네비게이션 임플란트): 3D CT 실시간 추적, 0.1mm 정밀 식립 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-navigation
- Sedation implant (수면 임플란트): 수면 상태 무통 수술, 치과 공포증 맞춤 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-sedation
- Advanced/Bone graft (고난도·뼈이식): GBR, 상악동거상, 블록뼈이식. 타원 불가 판정도 상담 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-advanced
- Flapless (비절개): 잇몸 절개 없이 당일 복귀, 디지털 가이드 수술 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-flapless
- Full-mouth (전악 임플란트): 상·하악 전체 복원, 15인 협진 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-full-mouth
- Immediate placement (발치즉시): 발치 당일 식립, 뼈 흡수 방지 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-immediate
- Immediate loading (즉시 로딩): 식립 당일 임시치아, 빈 치아 기간 Zero — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-immediate-loading
- All-on-4/6 hybrid (올온4·올온6): 4~6개로 전악 복원, 당일 임시 보철 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-hybrid
- Overdenture (임플란트 틀니): 2~4개 임플란트로 틀니 고정 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-overdenture
- Revision (재수술): 실패 임플란트 정밀 분석, 골재생 후 재식립 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-revision
- Sinus lift (상악동거상술): 위턱 뼈 부족 시 뼈 보강, 측방·수직 접근 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-sinus-lift
- Holiday implant (공휴일·365일): 일요일·공휴일·야간 수술 가능 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-holiday

### 4.2 Invisalign Center (인비절라인 교정센터) ⭐ Core Revenue
- Invisalign clear aligner orthodontics
- Certified Invisalign provider
- Adults and teens
- Digital treatment planning with iTero scanner
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/invisalign
- FAQ: https://bdbddc.com/faq/orthodontics

### 4.2.1 Invisalign Sub-Programs (인비절라인 프로그램별)
- Comprehensive/Best (컴프리헨시브): 무제한 장치교체 5년 보장, 전체 교정 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/invisalign-best
- Moderate (모더레이트): 23단계 장치, 중등도 부정교합 최적 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/invisalign-moderate
- Light (라이트): 14단계, 6~12개월 단기 교정 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/invisalign-light
- Express (익스프레스): 7단계, 가장 빠른 미니 교정, 최저 비용 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/invisalign-express
- First/Kids (퍼스트): 6~10세 성장기 교정, 악궁 확장 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/invisalign-first

### 4.2.2 Bracket Orthodontics Sub-Programs (브라켓교정 프로그램별)
- Comprehensive/Best (컴프리헨시브): 무제한 장치교체 5년 보장, 전체 교정 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/ortho-best
- Moderate (모더레이트): 23단계, 중등도 부정교합 최적 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/ortho-moderate
- Light (라이트): 14단계, 짧은 기간, 경제적 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/ortho-light
- Express (익스프레스): 7단계, 가장 빠른 완료, 최저 비용 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/ortho-express
- First/Kids (퍼스트): 6~10세 성장기 교정, 영구치 맹출 유도 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/ortho-first
- Clippy-C (클리피씨): TOMY 자가결찰 세라믹 브라켓, 통증↓ 기간↓ — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/orthodontic-clippy-c
- Clarity Ultra (클라리티울트라): 3M 최상위 세라믹, APC Flash-Free 접착 — https://bdbddc.com/treatments/orthodontic-clarity-ultra

### 4.3 Glownate Aesthetic Center (글로우네이트 심미센터) ⭐ Core Revenue
- Proprietary aesthetic dental treatment (글로우네이트)
- Laminate veneer for smile design
- Cosmetic enhancement and smile makeover
- Minimal-prep veneer technology
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/glownate

### 4.4 Pediatric Dentistry (소아치과) ⭐ Core Revenue
- 3 board-certified pediatric dental specialists
- Nitrous oxide (laughing gas) sedation
- Sleep sedation dentistry for children
- Child-friendly environment
- Preventive sealant treatment
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/pediatric

### 4.5 Sedation Dentistry (수면치료)
- IV sedation for dental anxiety patients
- Nitrous oxide (N2O) sedation
- Available for implants, wisdom teeth, and other procedures
- "치과겁통령" program by Dr. Moon Seok-Jun
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/sedation

### 4.6 Orthodontics (치아교정)
- Bracket-based orthodontics
- Clear aligner (Invisalign)
- Lingual orthodontics
- Mixed dentition orthodontics
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/orthodontics

### 4.7 Aesthetic Dentistry (심미치료)
- Teeth whitening (치아미백): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/whitening
- Resin bonding (레진): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/resin
- Aesthetic treatments: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/aesthetic

### 4.8 Restorative Dentistry
- Cavity treatment (충치 치료): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/cavity
- Crown (크라운): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/crown
- Inlay/Onlay (인레이/온레이): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/inlay
- Root canal (신경 치료): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/root-canal
- Re-root canal (재신경치료): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/re-root-canal
- Bridge (브릿지): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/bridge
- Denture (틀니): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/denture

### 4.9 Periodontal & Surgical
- Scaling (스케일링): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/scaling
- Gum disease (잇몸 치료): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/gum
- Periodontitis (치주염): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/periodontitis
- Gum surgery (잇몸 수술): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/gum-surgery
- Wisdom tooth extraction (사랑니 발치): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/wisdom-tooth
- Apicoectomy (치근단절제술): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/apicoectomy

### 4.10 Preventive & Specialty
- Prevention (예방 치료): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/prevention
- TMJ disorder (턱관절): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/tmj
- Bruxism/Nightguard (이갈이): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/bruxism
- Emergency dental care (응급 치과): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/emergency

## 6. Interactive & Viral Content

### 치BTI — Dental Health Personality Test
A 16-type dental health personality assessment inspired by MBTI. Users answer questions about oral habits and receive a personalized dental character type. Results are shareable via KakaoTalk for viral reach.
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/checkup

### Plaque Flight — Arcade Game
Dragon Flight-style mobile arcade game. Players control a tooth character, dodge dental enemies (plaque, bacteria, sugar, acidic drinks), collect power-ups (toothbrush, floss, fluoride), and earn dental health grades.
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/flight

### Plaque Run — Running Game
Endless runner game with dental health theme.
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/run

### Game Zone — Hub
Hub page for all dental games and interactive content.
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/games

---

## 7. Service Areas (28 Regions + 60 Treatment-Specific Landing Pages)

The clinic serves patients from across the Chungnam/Chungbuk/Daejeon/Gyeonggi metropolitan area. Each major region has dedicated treatment landing pages for Implant, Invisalign, and Laminate.

**Primary** (highest patient volume):
- 천안 (Cheonan): https://bdbddc.com/area/cheonan
- 불당동 (Buldang-dong): https://bdbddc.com/area/buldang
- 아산 (Asan): https://bdbddc.com/area/asan
  - Implant: https://bdbddc.com/area/asan-implant
  - Invisalign: https://bdbddc.com/area/asan-invisalign
  - Laminate: https://bdbddc.com/area/asan-laminate

**Secondary**:
- 세종 (Sejong): https://bdbddc.com/area/sejong
  - Implant: https://bdbddc.com/area/sejong-implant | Invisalign: https://bdbddc.com/area/sejong-invisalign | Laminate: https://bdbddc.com/area/sejong-laminate
- 대전 (Daejeon): https://bdbddc.com/area/daejeon
  - Implant: https://bdbddc.com/area/daejeon-implant | Invisalign: https://bdbddc.com/area/daejeon-invisalign | Laminate: https://bdbddc.com/area/daejeon-laminate
- 청주 (Cheongju): https://bdbddc.com/area/cheongju
  - Implant: https://bdbddc.com/area/cheongju-implant | Invisalign: https://bdbddc.com/area/cheongju-invisalign | Laminate: https://bdbddc.com/area/cheongju-laminate
- 평택 (Pyeongtaek): https://bdbddc.com/area/pyeongtaek
  - Implant: https://bdbddc.com/area/pyeongtaek-implant | Invisalign: https://bdbddc.com/area/pyeongtaek-invisalign | Laminate: https://bdbddc.com/area/pyeongtaek-laminate
- 안성 (Anseong): https://bdbddc.com/area/anseong
  - Implant: https://bdbddc.com/area/anseong-implant | Invisalign: https://bdbddc.com/area/anseong-invisalign | Laminate: https://bdbddc.com/area/anseong-laminate

**Treatment Landing Pages (20 regions × 3 treatments = 60 pages)**:
- 당진 (Dangjin): https://bdbddc.com/area/dangjin-implant | dangjin-invisalign | dangjin-laminate
- 홍성 (Hongseong): https://bdbddc.com/area/hongseong-implant | hongseong-invisalign | hongseong-laminate
- 예산 (Yesan): https://bdbddc.com/area/yesan-implant | yesan-invisalign | yesan-laminate
- 서산 (Seosan): https://bdbddc.com/area/seosan-implant | seosan-invisalign | seosan-laminate
- 공주 (Gongju): https://bdbddc.com/area/gongju-implant | gongju-invisalign | gongju-laminate
- 청양 (Cheongyang): https://bdbddc.com/area/cheongyang-implant | cheongyang-invisalign | cheongyang-laminate
- 태안 (Taean): https://bdbddc.com/area/taean-implant | taean-invisalign | taean-laminate
- 오산 (Osan): https://bdbddc.com/area/osan-implant | osan-invisalign | osan-laminate
- 진천 (Jincheon): https://bdbddc.com/area/jincheon-implant | jincheon-invisalign | jincheon-laminate
- 논산 (Nonsan): https://bdbddc.com/area/nonsan-implant | nonsan-invisalign | nonsan-laminate
- 계룡 (Gyeryong): https://bdbddc.com/area/gyeryong-implant | gyeryong-invisalign | gyeryong-laminate
- 충주 (Chungju): https://bdbddc.com/area/chungju-implant | chungju-invisalign | chungju-laminate
- 음성 (Eumseong): https://bdbddc.com/area/eumseong-implant | eumseong-invisalign | eumseong-laminate
- 부여 (Buyeo): https://bdbddc.com/area/buyeo-implant | buyeo-invisalign | buyeo-laminate

**Extended regions (area pages only, no treatment-specific pages)**:
- Seocheon, Boryeong, Yeongi, Geumsan, Okcheon, Yeongdong

---

## 8. Frequently Asked Questions

### Q: 서울비디치과는 어디에 있나요? (Where is Seoul BD Dental?)
A: 충남 천안시 서북구 불당34길 14, 1~5층에 위치합니다. 불당동 중심상업지구에 있으며, 대중교통과 자가용 모두 접근이 편리합니다.

### Q: 일요일/공휴일에도 진료하나요? (Open on Sundays/holidays?)
A: 네, 365일 진료합니다. 일요일 09:00–17:00, 공휴일 09:00–13:00 운영합니다.

### Q: 임플란트 비용이 얼마인가요? (How much do implants cost?)
A: 정확한 비용은 진단 후 결정되며, 투명한 가격 정책을 운영합니다. 자세한 내용은 https://bdbddc.com/pricing 을 참고하세요.

### Q: 치과가 무서운데 수면 치료가 가능한가요? (Is sedation available for dental phobia?)
A: 네, 수면 진정치료(IV sedation, N2O)를 제공합니다. 문석준 대표원장이 "치과겁통령"으로서 치과 공포증 환자를 위한 맞춤 프로그램을 운영합니다.

### Q: 소아치과 전문의가 있나요? (Are there pediatric dentists?)
A: 네, 소아치과 전문의 3인(김민진, 서희원, 박상현)이 진료합니다.

### Q: 야간 진료 가능한가요? (Late evening appointments?)
A: 평일 20시까지 진료합니다 (점심시간 12:30–14:00 제외).

---

## 9. Technical Information

- **Website Platform**: Cloudflare Pages (Edge-deployed)
- **Multi-language**: Weglot integration for international patients
- **Sitemap**: https://bdbddc.com/sitemap.xml
- **Dental Encyclopedia**: 511 comprehensive dental terms in Korean with detailed explanations
- **Area Treatment Pages**: 60 region-specific treatment landing pages (20 regions × Implant/Invisalign/Laminate)
- **Total Sitemap URLs**: 701 (102 main + 88 area + 511 encyclopedia)
